channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: US, Iran teams in Pakistan for peace talks

item.title: Trump says US forces are ‘clearing’ Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Two U.S. Warships Pass Through Strait Of Hormuz As Trump Claims Forces Are ‘Clearing' The Strait
- Trump says U.S. will have Strait of Hormuz 'open fairly soon'
- US says warships transit Strait of Hormuz in mine clearance op

- IRGC to prevent all military vessels from crossing Strait of Hormuz

- Artemis II astronauts safely back on Earth after historic trip around moon
- Artemis II crew's 10-day trip around Earth & Moon — timeline of Nasa’s historic lunar mission
- NASA's Artemis II astronauts back on earth after record-breaking trip around the moon
- Title: Artemis II astronauts journey back to Earth after Moon mission
- Major milestone for NASA as Artemis II splashes down after historic Moon mission
- Spacecraft carrying Artemis II mission astronauts returns to Earth — NASA
- Artemis II astronauts return to earth after historic lunar mission
- Splashdown of Artemis II astronauts concludes 10-day moon mission
- Artemis II splashdown: Astronauts return to Earth after lunar mission
- Artemis II splashdown: Astronauts return safely to earth after successful 10-day moon mission
